jsonLd.title: Porter is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
